description: In this video, the host discusses the development of a Unity Web2 game called Legends of the Sun with SpaceMandev. They explore features like item minting as compressed objects and a central limit order book for trading low liquidity items on Solana.
topic_summary: Discussion on building Legends of the Sun, a Unity Web2 game, including features like generalized compression and a central limit order book for trading on Solana [t=21:60].
